title: APM: Octo Demo Span Link Analysis
description: Link analysis for octo-apm-demo spans. Groups events by Trace ID, Span ID, Parent Span ID, and Span Name to make parent-child span correlation visible in the dashboard.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and ('Service Name' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'APM Domain' = 'octo-apm-demo' or 'Attack ID' != null) and 'Trace ID' != null | link span = 5minute 'Trace ID', 'Span ID', 'Parent Span ID', 'Span Name' | eventstats distinctcount('Trace ID') as Traces, sum(Count) as Events, distinctcount('Span ID') as Spans, distinctcount('Parent Span ID') as Parents

visualizationOptions.tileLayoutXml: <title-text>Trace Groups</title-text><title-text>Events</title-text><title-text>Spans</title-text><title-text>Parents</title-text>

ask_ai_prompts: Walk the parent-child span path for the highest-volume octo-apm-demo trace.
Which span appears to be the root cause in the failed checkout trace?
